narrative:
Crosby Twp. township has 5,456 registered voters, with 52.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.5 percentage points.
